bonus_properties.name: Keen Edge
bonus_properties.description: The blade hums a low note when it cuts the air.

bonus_properties.name: Balanced Heft
bonus_properties.description: It sits in the hand like it was poured to fit your grip.

bonus_properties.name: Bright Ring
bonus_properties.description: Every parry answers with a clear, singing chime.

bonus_properties.name: True Temper
bonus_properties.description: The steel takes a strike and gives back not a single shiver.

flaws.name: Dull Bite
flaws.description: The edge drags where it should slice; you feel it catch.

flaws.name: Loose Tang
flaws.description: A faint rattle in the hilt with every swing.

flaws.name: Off Balance
flaws.description: It pulls forward, fighting your wrist on the return.

flaws.name: Brittle Spine
flaws.description: A hairline creak runs the length when it bears weight.

bonus_properties.name: Snug Fit
bonus_properties.description: The plates settle without a clatter, quiet as a held breath.

bonus_properties.name: Deep Weave
bonus_properties.description: Blows land with a dull, distant thud you barely feel.

bonus_properties.name: Light Carry
bonus_properties.description: It rides the shoulders so easily you forget the weight.

bonus_properties.name: Storm Shed
bonus_properties.description: Rain beads and runs off with a soft hiss.

flaws.name: Pinch Seam
flaws.description: A seam bites at the shoulder with each step.

flaws.name: Loud Plate
flaws.description: It announces every movement with a tinny clank.

flaws.name: Thin Guard
flaws.description: One section gives a hollow ring when struck.

flaws.name: Stiff Joint
flaws.description: An elbow plate grinds and resists when you reach.

bonus_properties.name: Clean Draught
bonus_properties.description: It goes down cool and bright, no bitter aftertaste.

bonus_properties.name: Potent Brew
bonus_properties.description: Warmth blooms through you the instant it touches your tongue.

bonus_properties.name: Lasting Savor
bonus_properties.description: The effect lingers a beat longer than you expect.

bonus_properties.name: Settled Mix
bonus_properties.description: Perfectly blended — not a single grain settles at the bottom.

flaws.name: Acrid Tang
flaws.description: It scorches the throat going down.

flaws.name: Cloudy Settle
flaws.description: A gritty sediment swirls at the bottom of the vial.

flaws.name: Quick Fade
flaws.description: The warmth drains away almost as fast as it came.

flaws.name: Sour Note
flaws.description: A faint reek of spoilage clings to the cork.

bonus_properties.name: Sure Grip
bonus_properties.description: The handle never slips, even when your palms are slick.

bonus_properties.name: Smooth Action
bonus_properties.description: Every joint moves with an oiled, silent ease.

bonus_properties.name: True Set
bonus_properties.description: It bites and holds on the first try, no fumbling.

bonus_properties.name: Worn Warmth
bonus_properties.description: It feels broken-in already, like an old friend's hand.

flaws.name: Slick Handle
flaws.description: The grip turns in your hand at the worst moment.

flaws.name: Gritty Joint
flaws.description: A grinding catch fights you every other stroke.

flaws.name: Soft Head
flaws.description: The working edge dents and rounds far too soon.

flaws.name: Loose Pin
flaws.description: A pin works its way out with a thin, steady tick.

bonus_properties.name: Steady Glow
bonus_properties.description: The ward holds a calm, unwavering hum beneath the surface.

bonus_properties.name: Deep Root
bonus_properties.description: The magic settles in like it grew there, patient and sure.

bonus_properties.name: Clear Tone
bonus_properties.description: A single pure chime rings out when the power wakes.

bonus_properties.name: Warm Pulse
bonus_properties.description: It answers your touch with a gentle, living warmth.

flaws.name: Flicker Fault
flaws.description: The enchantment stutters, dimming and flaring at random.

flaws.name: Cold Bleed
flaws.description: A faint chill leaks from it, raising the hair on your arm.

flaws.name: Discordant Hum
flaws.description: An off-key drone scrapes at the edge of hearing.

flaws.name: Shallow Bind
flaws.description: The magic sits loose on the surface, ready to slough away.

bonus_properties.name: True Flight
bonus_properties.description: It leaves the string with a clean, whistling line.

bonus_properties.name: Deep Bite
bonus_properties.description: It strikes home with a solid, satisfying thunk.

bonus_properties.name: Matched Set
bonus_properties.description: Each one flies the same, drawn from a flawless batch.

bonus_properties.name: Keen Point
bonus_properties.description: The tip splits the air with a high, thin hiss.

flaws.name: Warped Shaft
flaws.description: It wobbles off-line with an audible flutter.

flaws.name: Loose Fletch
flaws.description: A feather peels back mid-flight with a tearing buzz.

flaws.name: Soft Tip
flaws.description: The point crumples on impact instead of biting.

flaws.name: Uneven Weight
flaws.description: It drops early, pulled down by a heavy, ill-cast head.
